Mar 23 call addressed WhatsApp Business setup — Otter notes mention Facebook Business troubleshooting. Chris explicitly asked Apr 2: 'Then we move to scanning my SMS (two numbers) and WhatsApp?' — Kevin confirmed yes, one layer at a time. WhatsApp Business API credentials/access from client still needed to proceed. Call scheduled Apr 7 may advance this.
